options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: character
options.description:
Determines the expected player character.
0: Ventus
1: Aqua
2: Terra

options.name: final_terra_xehanort_ii
options.description:
Determines if Aqua will need to defeat Final Terra Xehanort II to complete her seed.
Does nothing if the player chooses a character other than Aqua

options.name: mirage_arena
options.description: Determines if Mirage Arena battle locations should be included.

options.name: command_board
options.description: Determines if Mirage Arena Command Board locations should be included.

options.name: super_bosses
options.description: Determines if Super Boss locations should be included.

options.name: realm_of_darkness
options.description: If your character is Aqua, determines if Realm of Darkness is included as a world.

options.name: minigames
options.description: Determines whether to include locations for the Disney Town minigames and the racing minigames in Mirage Arena

options.name: arena_medals
options.description: Determines if there should be locations for Mirage Arena medal collecting. Currently these have no logic or shortcuts beyond having Mirage Arena.

options.name: arena_global_locations
options.description:
Determines if there should be locations for the Mirage Arena missions that require beating the game with each character
Also enables Combined Threat and Monster of the Deep without their respective worlds
If playing on a fresh save leave this off or you'll have unreachable locations!

options.name: exp_multiplier
options.description: Determines the multiplier to apply to EXP gained

options.name: max_hp_increases
options.description: Number of Max HP Increases are in the item pool.

options.name: randomize_keyblade_stats
options.description: Determines if Keyblade stats should be randomized

options.name: keyblade_min_str
options.description: Determines the minimum Strength bonus a keyblade can have.

options.name: keyblade_max_str
options.description: Determines the maximum Strength bonus a keyblade can have.

options.name: keyblade_min_mgc
options.description: Determines the minimum Magic bonus a keyblade can have.

options.name: keyblade_max_mgc
options.description: Determines the maximum Magic bonus a keyblade can have.

options.name: starting_worlds
options.description: Number of random worlds to start with.

options.name: advanced_logic
options.description: If enabled, using commands for tricky movement and precise jumps will be required to reach many locations

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
